title: Han (Simon) Yan
text: Master of Professional Studies in Information Science @ Cornell University

title: Simon Yan
text:
I am a Data Analyst specializing in Assurance Artificial Intelligence Technology and Technical Analysis.
My work focuses on leveraging R and Python to ensure the robustness of AI systems and identifying patterns in financial markets.



AI Assurance: Model validation, bias detection, and quality control.
Data Visualization: Advanced plotting using ggplot2 and plotly.
Trading Analytics: Technical analysis and options strategies.

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:
🚀 Professional Profile
[cite_start]I am a Data Science specialist at Cornell University focusing on Assurance AI Technology[cite: 5, 6]. My mission is to ensure that AI systems are not only intelligent but also robust, transparent, and reliable.
[cite_start]By leveraging my academic foundation in Stochastic Processes, Markov Chains, and Monte Carlo Simulations, I architect scalable data solutions that bridge the gap between complex mathematical theory and actionable business integrity[cite: 7].

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:
📊 Core Expertise: Assurance & Quant Research

High-Stakes Data Reliability
During my tenure at Central China Securities, I architected an automated ETL pipeline processing 100K+ daily entries. I implemented rigorous cleaning logic and outlier handling — the bedrock of Assurance AI — to ensure the stability of 10+ multi-factor alpha signals.

Stochastic Modeling for Risk
Applying Markov Chains and Monte Carlo Simulations to quantify uncertainty and model regime-switching behavior in financial time series — translating probabilistic outputs into interpretable risk metrics for business stakeholders.

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:
🎨 Beyond the Code
When I’m not optimizing backtesting frameworks or simulating Markov chains, I explore the world through a different lens:

Music: Bass Guitar & Harmonica player. Deeply inspired by 80s Rock and Classic/Pioneer Jazz.
Visuals: Passionate about Film Photography.
Entrepreneurship: 2nd Place Winner in the UC Davis Big Bang! Competition for founding RoomExchange.

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:

I am actively seeking opportunities in Assurance AI Technology, Quantitative Analysis, and Data Science. If you are looking for someone who can ensure your data systems are as reliable as they are intelligent, let’s connect!

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:
🚀 Professional Profile
I am an Information Science graduate student at Cornell University specializing in Data Science and Assurance AI Technology. My expertise lies in bridging the gap between complex quantitative modeling and business-critical reliability.
With a background in Stochastic Processes and Quantitative Finance, I build robust data systems that ensure AI transparency and model integrity.

title: Han (Simon) Yan
text:
📊 Core Expertise: Assurance & Quant Research

High-Stakes Data Reliability
At Central China Securities, I architected an automated ETL pipeline processing 100K+ daily entries. My focus was on rigorous cleaning logic and outlier handling—the bedrock of Assurance AI—to ensure the stability of 10+ multi-factor alpha signals.


Predictive Strategic Analysis
Leading a 7-person team for The Riverside Company, I independently quantified investment predictability. I translate complex quantitative discoveries into actionable business strategies, ensuring that AI-driven insights are both reproducible and interpretable.
